Baseline.omission: Decisions made in earlier chunks absent from later summaries
Baseline.redundancy: Same speaker re-introduced multiple times across chunk summaries
Baseline.incoherence: No narrative thread connecting action items to decisions
Baseline.context_loss: The rationale behind any decision is unavailable without the prior chunk context

Method1.compression_loss: Memory capping at 150 words discards early specifics
Method1.snowball_error: Early summarization error propagates through all later steps
Method1.generic_drift: Output converges to generic language over recursive updates
Method1.speaker_loss: Individual speaker attributions diluted in memory compression

Method2.prompt_sensitivity: Persona output quality varies with minor prompt wording changes
Method2.fact_leakage: Step 1 extraction occasionally includes cross-persona facts
Method2.keyword_anchoring: Model anchors on persona keywords even when not factually supported
Method2.brevity_trade_off: Role-specific focus causes omission of cross-cutting decisions
